description.value:
[free action] Archetype, Concentrate

Trigger You make a Strike with Armament Haki active.

You weave Conqueror's Haki directly into a physical blow — an advanced technique that cracks the very will of those struck. The triggering Strike gains the following additional effects:

  • On a hit, the Strike deals +4d6 force damage.
  • On a hit, the target must succeed at a Will saving throw (DC = your class DC) or become Frightened 2 (Frightened 3 on a critical failure). A target that is already Stunned instead remains Stunned for an additional round.
  • On a critical hit, the target is also Stunned 1 regardless of the Will save result.

Frequency Once per round.
description.gm: Conqueror's Infusion is the offensive expression of what Conqueror's Haki becomes at high levels in the series — coating attacks with raw willpower rather than simply releasing it in a burst. The force damage bypasses physical resistances by nature. The Will save effect can stack with ongoing fear conditions but should not stack with itself (a target already at Frightened 3 takes no additional fear from a second use).
